title: thelypteris rubra
intro: Thelypteris rubra, also known as the red maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. The leaves of the Thelypteris rubra plant are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparation of Thelypteris rubra typically involves drying the leaves to make tea or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
